---
name: Model / Provider Request
about: Request a new model source, provider flow, or import improvement
title: "[model/provider] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What do you want to add?

Describe the model, provider, or import workflow you want JoyBoy to support.

## Source type

- Hugging Face
- CivitAI
- Other provider
- Local pack
- Not sure yet

## Why is it useful?

Explain the user-facing value.

## Constraints

Include anything relevant:

- gated/private repo
- auth required
- large model size
- platform limitations
- UI/UX expectations

## Extra context

Links, screenshots, or examples are welcome.
